groq-compound-notes.notes:
## Groq Compound (middle-tier)
- **Model**: `groq/compound` — balanced quality/speed, ~10s, ~7K tokens
- **Use for**: code generation, specs, structured documents, analysis
- **Also**: `groq/compound-mini` — lighter version for simpler tasks
- **vs llama-3.3-70b**: Compound is slower but much higher quality output
- **vs deepseek-chat**: Compound is faster but less creative
- **Sweet spot**: Middle of the road for when you need quality code fast

### Model Tier Strategy (updated)
| Tier | Model | Speed | Quality | Cost | Use |
|------|-------|-------|---------|------|-----|
| Spray | llama-3.3-70b | 24ms | OK | Free | Quick hits, formatting |
| Middle | groq/compound | 10s | Good | Free | Code, specs, docs |
| Deep | deepseek-chat | 15s | Great | $0.00x | Analysis, architecture |
| Creative | Qwen3-235B | 20s | Wild | $0.00x | Creative, synthesis |
| Expert | glm-5.1 (me) | - | Best | Plan | Oracle1 thinking |
